prompt: A high-impact shonen manga anime illustration of a powerful white-haired sorcerer in a dramatic low-angle full-body pose, laughing with his head thrown back and mouth wide open, wearing a sleek black high-collar uniform and a black blindfold over his eyes. His left hand is thrust toward the viewer making a two-finger peace sign, with strong foreshortening that makes the hand large in the foreground, while his right arm hangs lower at his side. Surround him with explosive electric blue supernatural energy, violent brushstroke-like aura trails, flying debris, sparks, and swirling curved streaks cutting across the frame. The background should be a dark, abstract, chaotic energy burst with glowing blue shards and motion lines, creating a sense of overwhelming power. Use bold cel-shaded anime rendering with painterly highlights, sharp linework, intense contrast, and glossy fabric folds on the black outfit. On the right side, add 1 large jagged white manga speech bubble with thick black outline containing the text LUDDITES ALWAYS LOSE! in huge distressed black uppercase letters. Vertical composition, dynamic action poster framing, confident triumphant attitude, modern dark fantasy anime aesthetic.
